meaning: n.皱,摺缝,皱痕v.缩紧,(使)皱缩,卷缩
examples: Objective To investigate the clinical effect of method of whole skin in armpit crimple with small incision for treatment of hircismus.
Conclusion The method of whole skin in armpit crimple with small incision for treatment of hircismus has advantage of simplicity and safe.
Different covers with filter membrane have relation to the pressure by line reducing. There is obviously crimple and exfoliate of endothelial cells injury when covered by 8 membranes.
